title: Awesome Machines
body:
# Awesome Machines

**Part of the Awesome Mods** -- requires https://modrinth.com/mod/awesome-core!

- collector
- quarry (with efficiency & fortune)
- crafter / recycler
- ore processing...
- worldgen: randomium (random ore & teleports)
- item: imprisoner (to capture and release entities)
- item: prospector (to make ores glow)

https://github.com/shkschneider/mc_awesome/blob/main/README.md
